message: I want to return a dive computer I bought last week because the screen is too small for me underwater.
I was charged twice for my wetsuit order and need help checking the invoice.
My regulator spare parts still have not arrived even though the tracking page says delivered.
Can I move my open water course booking from next weekend to the following weekend?
I need annual service for my BCD inflator and second stage regulator before a trip next month.
I want to know if there are still two spots available on the wreck dive excursion on April 20.
I bought fins on January 5 and would like to return them now because they are uncomfortable after a few dives.
The total for my mask and snorkel set looks wrong, but I cannot find the order number in my email.
The parcel with my drysuit arrived with damage to the outer packaging and I need to report it.
I want to return a wetsuit, but I no longer have the order number available in my account.
I need to cancel my guided night dive booking because of a medical issue and want to know my options.
I want to return a used neoprene hood that I tested once in the pool because it feels too tight.
